channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Fifteen Activists Detained Over Alleged Planned Shoplifting and Redistribution Campaign
item.description: Fifteen activists associated with the group Take Back Power were arrested in Westminster for allegedly planning a mass shoplifting campaign. The group, which has previously staged stunts such as throw...

item.title: Disoufeng wins two top awards at Soweto Tourism Awards
item.description: Tebogo Phiri, the founder of Disoufeng, celebrated a significant achievement after the brand scooped two major accolades at the Soweto Tourism Awards, namely Best Urban Lifestyle (Nightlife Experience...

item.title: New Analysis Shows Tyrannosaurus rex Grew Over Four Decades
item.description: A new study challenges previous assumptions about the growth of Tyrannosaurus rex, suggesting that this iconic dinosaur took approximately 40 years to reach its full size, rather than the earlier esti...

item.title: Pakistan Awards Nishan-e-Pakistan to Jordan's King Abdullah II During State Visit
item.description: On November 16, 2025, President Asif Ali Zardari conferred Pakistan's highest civilian award, the Nishan-e-Pakistan, upon Jordan's King Abdullah II ibn Al Hussein at a special investiture ceremony hel...

item.title: Indian Air Force Sukhoi Su-30 Aircraft Crashes in Karbi Anglong, Assam; Rescue Teams Deployed
item.description: In a significant incident, an Indian Air Force Sukhoi Su-30 fighter jet has reportedly crashed in the Karbi Anglong district of Assam. Immediate search and rescue operations have been launched to loca...

item.title: Pakistan’s Deputy PM Dar attends SCO Council meeting in Moscow
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar arrived in Moscow on Monday to participate in the Shanghai Cooperation Organisation (SCO) Council of Heads of Government (CHG) meeting s...

item.title: UK Diesel Prices Reach 16-Month High Amid Rising Oil Costs from Middle East Conflict
item.description: UK diesel prices have climbed to a 16-month high of 147 pence per liter, while petrol has risen to 136 pence per liter, according to the RAC. This surge follows the outbreak of war in the Middle East,...

item.title: Matildas Beat Iran 4-0 and Swap Jerseys in Gesture of Respect Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: The Matildas secured a 4-0 win over Iran in their group-stage match on the Gold Coast, continuing their strong form following a previous victory over the Philippines. Midfielder Amy Sayer opened the s...

item.title: Oscar Piastri encounters mechanical problems in opening practice
item.description: During the opening practice session, Australian Formula 1 driver Oscar Piastri experienced mechanical difficulties that forced him to slow down on the track. Shortly after the session began, Piastri r...

item.title: Graduating high school student killed, five others wounded in crossfire from clan feud in Maguindanao del Sur and Cotabato border
item.description: A tragic incident unfolded at the border between Datu Piang town in Maguindanao del Sur and Nabalawag town in the Bangsamoro Special Geographic Area, Cotabato province, where two heavily armed Muslim ...

item.title: Political Parties Demand Amendments to 2026 Electoral Act to Protect Rights Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: As e be now, all registered political parties wey dey Nigeria don yan say dem fit waka comot for 2027 general elections if National Assembly no look some sections of the 2026 Electoral Act wey Preside...

item.title: Ocean Patterns Limit Global Drought Spread and Protect Food Security
item.description: Researchers at the Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IITGN), collaborating with international partners, have found that ocean temperature patterns significantly influence the spread of droug...

item.title: Kaitlan Collins Defends CNN Coverage of Fallen U.S. Troops After White House Clash
item.description: CNN correspondent Kaitlan Collins responded to a tense exchange with White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt over coverage of the U.S. military's casualties in Iran. The conflict arose after Defe...

item.title: U.S. House votes to support President Trump’s military action in Iran despite war powers resolution
item.description: On 5th March 2026, the U.S. House of Representatives voted against a bipartisan resolution aimed at limiting President Donald Trump’s military campaign against Iran. The resolution sought to require C...

item.title: Review of ZEE5 Marathi Horror Series ‘Andhar Maya’ Set in Konkan
item.description: ‘Andhar Maya’ is ZEE5’s first Marathi horror series, set in the scenic Konkan region of Western India. The show follows an extended family visiting their ancestral home to observe death rites of a rec...

item.title: Finn Allen Highlights New Zealand's Boosted Confidence After Semi-Final Win Over South Africa
item.description: New Zealand's opener Finn Allen described their massive semi-final victory over South Africa as a major confidence booster ahead of the T20 World Cup final on Sunday in Ahmedabad. Allen smashed the fa...

item.title: Middle East conflict intensifies with Iran targeting Kurdish groups and regional strikes
item.description: The Middle East is witnessing a rapid escalation of conflict after US-Israeli attacks on Iran killed the country’s supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. In retaliation, Iran launched strikes on Kurd...

item.title: Mamata alleges Matua community faces exclusion from voter lists during SIR process
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has raised concerns regarding the Matua community, alleging that they are being deliberately excluded from the voter lists through the Special Intensive Revi...

item.title: NUJ Calls for Immediate Measures to Tackle Rising Insecurity in Ondo State
item.description: The Nigeria Union of Journalists (NUJ), Ondo State chapter, don express serious concern as security wahala dey increase for the state, especially kidnappings. During their monthly congress for Alagbak...

item.title: The Role of Male Teachers in Promoting Gender Equality in Schools
item.description: International Women’s Day is a reminder for everyone, regardless of gender, to reflect on and act against gender inequality. Schools are pivotal environments for promoting gender equity, as teachers i...
